items.markdown:
![Bangalore To Coorg Taxi - Coorg Package](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/05080514-1420-0139-0000-c5cd64603100:4)
One-way cab services from Bangalore to Coorg `start around ₹2,800–₹3,500 for sedans and ₹4,500–₹8,000+ for SUVs` , with a travel time of approximately 5.5 to 6.5 hours (approx. 270 km). Popular options include [MakeMyTrip](https://www.makemytrip.com/car-rental/bangalore-coorg-cab-services.html), [Savaari](https://www.savaari.com/bangalore/bangalore-to-coorg-cabs) , and [Goibibo](https://www.goibibo.com/cars/bangalore-to-coorg-cabs/) for reliable, pre-booked rides.[](https://www.makemytrip.com/car-rental/bangalore-coorg-cab-services.html#:~:text=Bangalore%20To%20Coorg%20Cabs%2C%20Use%20%22CABTRIP%22%20Upto,30%20mins%20%C2%B7%20Bangalore%20to%20Coorg%20one) [[1]](https://www.makemytrip.com/car-rental/bangalore-coorg-cab-services.html)[[2]](https://quickride.in/bangalore-to-coorg-cabs.php)[[3]](https://www.savaari.com/bangalore/bangalore-to-coorg-cabs)[[4]](https://www.goibibo.com/cars/bangalore-to-coorg-cabs/)[[5]](https://www.broomboomcabs.com/taxi-service/bangalore-to-coorg-cab-cost)

**Key Details and Options:** 

- **One-way Fares:** Sedan prices start at approx. ₹2,848 (4-seater), and SUV prices start at ₹4,051–₹6,326+ (6-7 seater).
- **Key Providers:** [Quick Ride](https://quickride.in/bangalore-to-coorg-cabs.php), Savaari, Goibibo , and MakeMyTrip offer various vehicle types including hatchbacks, sedans, and SUVs (Innova/Crysta).
- **Booking Options:** 
	- **One-way:** Best for direct travel, starting at approx. ₹3,000–₹3,500.
	- **Round Trip:** Often available for 2-3 day trips, with 2-day budget trips costing around ₹4,000–₹6,500.
- **Toll & Other Charges:** Note that most base fares do not include toll fees, parking charges, or state entry permits.[](https://quickride.in/bangalore-to-coorg-cabs.php#:~:text=Bangalore%20to%20Coorg%20Oneway%20cabs%20&%20Round,%E2%82%B92848.%20Get%2010%25%20Off%20on%20Advance%20Booking.) [[1]](https://quickride.in/bangalore-to-coorg-cabs.php)[[2]](https://www.savaari.com/bangalore/bangalore-to-coorg-cabs)[[3]](https://www.broomboomcabs.com/taxi-service/bangalore-to-coorg-cab-cost)[[4]](https://www.goibibo.com/cars/bangalore-to-coorg-cabs/)[[5]](https://www.goibibo.com/cars/innova-car-from-bangalore-to-coorg/)[[6]](https://www.bharattaxi.com/bangalore-to-coorg)[[7]](https://asterholidays.com/how-much-does-a-weekend-trip-to-coorg-cost-from-bangalore/)

**Travel Tips:** 

- **Best Route:** The most common route is Bangalore – Mysore – Kushalnagar – Madikeri (Coorg) via NH 275.
- **Booking Time:** Free cancellation is often available up to 1 hour before departure.
- **Vehicle Types:** Hatchbacks, Sedans (Dzire, Etios), and SUVs (Innova, Ertiga, Crysta) are readily available.[](https://www.makemytrip.com/car-rental/bangalore-coorg-cab-services.html#:~:text=Bangalore%20To%20Coorg%20Cabs%2C%20Use%20%22CABTRIP%22%20Upto,30%20mins%20%C2%B7%20Bangalore%20to%20Coorg%20one) [[1]](https://www.makemytrip.com/car-rental/bangalore-coorg-cab-services.html)[[2]](https://www.goibibo.com/cars/innova-car-from-bangalore-to-coorg/)[[3]](https://taxibazaar.in/taxi-rental-bangalore-to-coorg.php)[[4]](https://www.tataneu.com/pages/travel/hotels/expert-insights-bangalore-to-coorg-road-trip-guide)[[5]](https://turuhi.com/resources/route-bangalore-to-coorg/)

expanded_element.title: How to Reach Coorg from Bangalore – Complete Travel Guide - Starscapes
expanded_element.description: Take a train from Bangalore to Mysore (best connectivity) or Hassan (alternative). From Mysore or Hassan, hire a taxi or take a bus to reach Coorg.

items.title: How to reach Coorg fastest?

expanded_element.title: How To Reach Coorg by Flights, Train, Air - Thomas Cook
expanded_element.description: Depending on which part of the country you are traveling from will decide the most convenient airport for you. The closest international one is Mangalore International Airport, sitting at a distance of just 140 kms from Coorg city centre. For domestic flights, the nearest one is at Mysore, 120 kms from Coorg.
